curation_notes: Locations derived directly from the patch diff which modified two files: web/pgadmin/tools/sqleditor/__init__.py (start_query_download_tool function, replacing eval(value) with safe string comparison for query_commited parameter) and web/pgacloud/providers/google.py (_create_google_postgresql_instance function, replacing eval(args.high_availability) with safe string comparison). Checked sibling cloud provider files (aws.py, azure.py, biganimal.py) — none use eval(). Kept pre-assigned command-injection class: while CWE-94 is technically 'Code Injection', the closest valid class is command-injection since eval() can execute arbitrary code including OS commands, and no dedicated code-injection class exists in the taxonomy.
